languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Не знаю, как отблагодарить вас за своевременное вмешательство. Эти люди все никак не могут понять, что некоторые вещи нельзя получить за знатное имя или почетный пост".
"Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Не знаю, как отблагодарить вас за своевременное вмешательство. Эти люди все никак не могут понять, что некоторые вещи нельзя получить за знатное имя или почетный пост".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."
"Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."
"Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."

languages.text: 「艦長様、お早めの介入に感謝の言葉が見つかりません。この人たちには、名声や地位で買えないものがあることを、まだ理解していないようです」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Zamanında müdahaleniz için size nasıl teşekkür edeceğimi bilemiyorum. Bu insanlar hâlâ soylu bir isimle ya da yüksek bir makamla satın alınamayacak bazı şeyler olduğunu anlamıyor."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan! Zamanında müdahaleniz için size nasıl teşekkür edeceğimi bilemiyorum. Bu insanlar hâlâ soylu bir isimle ya da yüksek bir makamla satın alınamayacak bazı şeyler olduğunu anlamıyor."

languages.text: “舰长大人！真不知该如何感谢您的及时介入。这些人始终无法明白，有些东西无法用高贵的姓氏或显赫的地位换取。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！真不知该如何感谢您的及时介入。这些人始终无法明白，有些东西无法用高贵的姓氏或显赫的地位换取。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Ich weiß nicht, wie ich Euch für Euer Eingreifen danken soll. Diese Leute verstehen immer noch nicht, dass man einige Dinge mit einem adeligen Namen und einer hohen Position nicht kaufen kann."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Ich weiß nicht, wie ich Euch für Euer Eingreifen danken soll. Diese Leute verstehen immer noch nicht, dass man einige Dinge mit einem adeligen Namen und einer hohen Position nicht kaufen kann."

languages.text: « Merci infiniment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous êtes {mf|intervenu|intervenue} à point nommé. Ces gens ne comprennent toujours pas que certaines choses ne peuvent s'acheter avec un noble nom ou un titre honorifique, si prestigieux soit-il. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."

traits.locale_text: « Merci infiniment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous êtes {mf|intervenu|intervenue} à point nommé. Ces gens ne comprennent toujours pas que certaines choses ne peuvent s'acheter avec un noble nom ou un titre honorifique, si prestigieux soit-il. »

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! No sé cómo agradecerle su llegada. Esta gente aún no entiende que hay cosas que no se pueden comprar con un nombre noble o un cargo elevado».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! I don't know how to thank you for your timely intervention. These people still don't understand that there are some things that can't be bought with a noble name or a lofty position."

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! No sé cómo agradecerle su llegada. Esta gente aún no entiende que hay cosas que no se pueden comprar con un nombre noble o un cargo elevado».
